caption: A video displays a webpage for "JASPYS CASEBREAKS.COM," featuring a product page for "2020 TOPPS CLEARLY AUTHENTIC BASEBALL 10-BOX 1/2 CASE BREAK #11 *2 RT EACH*" priced at "$59.99." The product is marked as "SOLD OUT." Two baseball cards are displayed side-by-side: one featuring a player in a white jersey and the other featuring Mike Trout in a red jersey. To the right, an embedded video window shows a man wearing a black baseball cap and a black t-shirt with a graphic on the front. He is positioned in front of a background that includes a logo for "JASPYS CASEBREAKS." Text at the bottom of the video player reads, "Hit the SUBSCRIBE button down below!" next to a red "Subscribe" button. Throughout the sequence, the webpage layout and the man's appearance remain static.
